title: Alphabet lifts capex guide to $205bn as Google Cloud jumps 82%
summary: Search revenue rose 17% to $63.3bn and YouTube advertising 13% to $11.1bn, while the Gemini app reached 950 million monthly active users and Alphabet’s first-party model APIs processed some 22 billion tokens a minute.
